name: Foundation 60
description: Core activities for speech, language, and regulation - clinically designed for 3-6 minute sessions

activities.title: Pop the P
activities.script_parent: Let's pop like popcorn: p-p-p! Child watches lips, copies.
activities.script_child: Make the popping sound! P-p-p like popcorn!

activities.title: Big B Bubbles
activities.script_child: Let's make bubbles! B-b-b!

activities.title: Tasty T
activities.script_parent: Tap your tongue: t-t-tap. Tea, toe, two.
activities.script_child: Make the tapping sound! T-t-t!

activities.title: D Drum Beats
activities.script_parent: Drum with d-d-d! do, da, dee
activities.script_child: Beat the drum! D-d-d!

activities.title: K Cookie Crunch
activities.script_child: Crunch like eating a cookie! K-k-k!

activities.title: G Go Go!
activities.script_child: Ready, set, G-g-go!

activities.title: S Snake Sound
activities.script_child: Be a snake! Ssssss!

activities.title: Z Zoom!
activities.script_child: Make the buzzing sound! Zzzzz!

activities.title: R Rocket Ready
activities.script_child: Rocket sound! Rrrrr!

activities.title: L Lemon Licks
activities.script_child: Lick a lemon! L-l-l!

activities.title: Touch and Show
activities.script_parent: Show me the cup. Touch the ball.
activities.script_child: Can you show me the cup?

activities.title: Big vs Small
activities.script_child: Which one is bigger?

variants.note: teach with pictures not real hot/cold

activities.title: In/On/Under
activities.script_parent: Put the bear in/on/under the box.
activities.script_child: Where should the bear go?
activities.generalization: Practice with different objects and containers

activities.title: Who? What? Where?
activities.script_child: Who is that? What are they doing? Where are they?
activities.generalization: Ask during book reading, TV watching

activities.title: Follow 2 Steps
activities.script_child: Listen for two things to do!

variants.example: If you're done, then put it away

activities.title: Function Match
activities.script_child: What do we use this for?
activities.generalization: Real objects around house and community

activities.title: Categories
activities.script_child: Sort these into groups!

activities.title: Yes/No Accuracy
activities.script_child: Yes or no?
activities.generalization: Use throughout day with real questions

activities.title: Point to Body Parts
activities.script_parent: Touch your nose! Show me your ears!
activities.script_child: Where's your nose?
activities.generalization: During bath, dressing, looking in mirror

activities.title: One-Step Routines
activities.script_parent: Put shoes by door. Hang coat up.
activities.script_child: Can you put your shoes there?

activities.title: Request with Words
activities.script_parent: Say: help me or I want cookie
activities.script_child: What do you want? Tell me!
activities.generalization: All day - any time child wants something

activities.title: Imitation Words
activities.script_parent: Say: mama, ball, go, up, eat, more, help, no, yes, bye
activities.script_child: Say what I say!
activities.generalization: Practice in natural contexts with real objects

activities.title: Comment What You See
activities.script_child: What is this? What do you see?
visuals: varied picture cards or real objects

activities.title: Expand to 2-Word
activities.script_child: Can you use two words?

activities.title: Pronouns Me/You
activities.script_parent: Who has the ball? I do/You do.
activities.script_child: Who has it? Say 'I do' or 'you do'!
visuals: objects to pass back and forth

activities.title: Past/Present
activities.script_child: Tell me - is it happening now or already happened?

activities.title: Functions Speak
activities.script_parent: We ride a... We cut with...
activities.script_child: Finish my sentence! We eat with a ___
activities.generalization: During daily activities and pretend play

activities.title: WH Ask Back
activities.target: Ask 3 wh questions about a picture
activities.script_parent: Look at this picture. Ask me questions! What? Who? Where?
activities.script_child: Ask me questions about what you see!
activities.generalization: Encourage questions during books, outings, conversations

activities.title: Sentence Starter
activities.script_child: Finish the sentence! I need ___
activities.generalization: Use throughout day for real needs and feelings

activities.title: Story Retell (Short)
activities.script_child: Tell me what happened in the story!

activities.title: Eye-Look + Point
activities.script_parent: Show me with your finger then look at me.
activities.script_child: Point to it and look!
activities.generalization: Point out things during walks, in books

variants.action: point to wanted item + look at adult
point to interesting thing + check if adult is looking

activities.title: Take Turns
activities.script_child: My turn! Now your turn!

activities.title: Greetings
activities.script_child: Say hi and wave!
activities.generalization: When people arrive, video calls, community

activities.title: Request Help Politely
activities.script_child: Ask for help nicely!
activities.generalization: When stuck, need assistance, can't reach something

activities.title: Waiting Game
activities.script_parent: Timer 10-30s; We wait; then we play.
activities.script_child: Can you wait for the timer?
activities.generalization: Before preferred activities, snack time, transitions

activities.title: Perspective Peek
activities.script_child: How do you think they feel?
activities.generalization: During books, TV, real social situations

variants.prompt: Why does she feel that way?

activities.title: Conversation Sandwich
activities.script_child: Say something, ask something, say something!

variants.example: I like LEGOs. What do you like? LEGOs are fun!
Math is hard. Do you like math? I wish it was easier.

activities.title: Repair Strategy
activities.script_parent: I didn't catch that—say it again?
activities.script_child: If you don't understand, ask them to repeat!

activities.title: 60-Second Reset
activities.script_child: Let's reset your body together!
activities.generalization: Before transitions, after upset, anytime needed

activities.title: Feelings Check
activities.script_child: How are you feeling? Pick what helps!
activities.mastery_rule: Can identify feeling and choose coping

activities.title: Turtle Shell
activities.script_child: Make your turtle shell!

activities.title: Five Senses Scan
activities.script_child: Let's notice what's around us!

activities.title: Visual Timer Transition
activities.script_parent: 2-min timer + when it's done, we switch
activities.script_child: When the timer is done, time to switch!
activities.generalization: Screen time, play time, any transitions

activities.title: Music Reset
activities.script_child: Pick your calm music!
activities.mastery_rule: Child uses music as coping strategy
activities.generalization: Car rides, bedtime, calm corner, transitions

activities.title: Ask for Break
activities.script_child: You can ask for a break when you need one!
activities.generalization: During work, play, any overwhelming situation

activities.title: First-Then Board
activities.script_child: First this, then that!

activities.title: Morning Steps
activities.script_child: Follow your morning routine!

activities.title: Backpack Ready
activities.script_child: Pack your backpack with everything you need!

activities.title: Hand Wash Hero
activities.script_child: Let's wash hands like a hero!
activities.generalization: Before meals, after bathroom, after messy play

activities.title: Toothbrush Tune
activities.script_child: Brush all your teeth while the song plays!

activities.title: Dressed in Two
activities.script_child: Can you put on your shirt and pants?

activities.title: Table Time (Short)
activities.script_child: Let's sit at the table together!

activities.title: Cleanup Race
activities.script_child: Let's race to clean up!

activities.title: Snack Request Board
activities.script_child: What snack do you want? Ask nicely!

activities.title: Sound Hunt
activities.script_child: What starts with the /s/ sound?
activities.generalization: During walks, in books, around house

activities.title: Rhyming Pairs
activities.script_child: What sounds like cat?
activities.generalization: During books, nursery rhymes, making up silly rhymes

activities.title: Syllable Clap
activities.script_child: Let's clap the word! Ta-ble (clap-clap)

activities.title: Working Memory 2
activities.script_child: I'm going to tell you 2 things - can you remember?

activities.title: Flex Switch
activities.script_child: Now we're sorting a different way!

activities.title: Plan the Day (Kid)
activities.script_child: What do you want to do today? Pick 3 things!
